content:
CORRECTION — MY APPLICATION WAS REACT NATIVE/EXPO FROM THE BEGINNING

My real application code was created as React Native/Expo. It was never a Swift application.

The current problem is that Rork incorrectly registered this workspace as Swift even though the repository contains my real Expo/React Native application.

Repository:
@[github:https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fibb142%2Frork-global-real-estate-invest:GitHub Sync - ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest]

Real mobile app root:
/expo

Do not describe my application as a Swift project.

The Swift shell is only an incorrect Rork workspace wrapper and must not be treated as the source application.

Required action:

1. Preserve my complete existing React Native/Expo code.
2. Do not rebuild, replace, or convert the app.
3. Create a new Rork workspace with platform type React Native.
4. Import the same GitHub repository.
5. Use /expo as the project root.
6. Keep GitHub as the source of truth.
7. Open the real IVX Expo app in the Rork emulator.
8. Verify Android and iOS preview.
9. Verify owner sign-in and all existing routes.
10. Provide proof that the new workspace platform is React Native.

Do not create a blank app.
Do not create a separate web app.
Do not create a duplicate repository.
Do not modify production credentials.

FINAL STATUS MUST SHOW:
- EXISTING_APP_TYPE: REACT_NATIVE_EXPO
- OLD_WORKSPACE_TYPE: INCORRECT_SWIFT_REGISTRATION
- NEW_WORKSPACE_TYPE: REACT_NATIVE
- PROJECT_ROOT: /expo
- GITHUB_REPOSITORY: ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
- EMULATOR_STATUS: VERIFIED
